stories.title: Review an agent's pull request
stories.intro: When an agent opens a PR it lands here for a human to approve before anything merges. Sign in once and every agent diff waits for your verdict.

steps.title: Sign in to PR
steps.caption: Your review inbox: every PR an agent opened, newest first, each tagged with who authored it (🤖 for an agent) and its diff size.

steps.title: Read the diff and decide
steps.caption: The full diff rendered file by file, additions and deletions side by side. Approve or request changes — the agent is polling for your verdict and continues the moment you decide.
